name: Deep Book Absorption (Extreme Thresholds)
hypothesis: A stronger deep-book bid imbalance (obi_ex_bbo > 0.5) combined with a more extreme seller-initiated trade flow (z-score < -3.0) will more reliably identify true absorption events, filtering out instances of 'spoofed' liquidity and improving the win rate.
mutation_note: Based on feedback to 'tighten_threshold'. Tightened both conditions (obi_ex_bbo > 0.4 to 0.5; z-score < -2.5 to -3.0) to test if a more extreme divergence and flow combination is more predictive.
